title: Cannot connect to VPN
description: User reports VPN disconnects after two minutes on Fedora laptop
resolution_text: Renewed client certificate and cleared stale gateway sessions. Issue resolved.

title: Production deploy failed
description: Jenkins pipeline fails on kubectl apply to staging cluster
resolution_text: Rolled back bad Helm chart revision and fixed image tag in values.yaml

title: PTO balance incorrect
description: Accrued vacation days do not match HR portal for fiscal year
resolution_text: HR corrected accrual table after payroll sync mismatch

title: Suspicious login attempts
description: Multiple failed sign-ins from unknown country overnight
resolution_text: Forced password reset and enabled geo-blocking on IdP

title: Laptop black screen after BIOS
description: ThinkPad shows black screen after splash no beeps
resolution_text: Replaced faulty RAM module and updated BIOS firmware

title: Email bounce SMTP 550
description: Outbound mail to customers rejected with error 550
resolution_text: Removed sender from blocklist and updated SPF record

title: Database connection timeout
description: Application queries timing out on customer DB during peak hours
resolution_text: Increased connection pool size and added read replica for reporting

title: New hire onboarding access
description: Contractor cannot access internal wiki and Slack
resolution_text: Provisioned accounts in Okta and assigned correct group memberships

title: Phishing email reported
resolution_text: Quarantined message cluster-wide and blocked sender domain

title: Printer paper jam persists
description: Office printer shows jam after tray cleared
resolution_text: Replaced worn pickup roller and calibrated tray sensors

title: VPN certificate expired
description: Remote users cannot authenticate to corporate VPN
resolution_text: Deployed new cert bundle to gateway and pushed client profile update

title: Kubernetes pod crash loop
description: Payment service pods restarting with OOMKilled
resolution_text: Raised memory limits and fixed memory leak in latest hotfix release
